name: the-librarian
description: Durable memory + cross-harness session lifecycle for Codex, backed by a remote Librarian MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Durable memory + automatic session lifecycle for Codex
interface.longDescription: The Librarian gives Codex a remote memory + session layer: recall/remember tools, automatic per-session lifecycle (start, checkpoint, pause, resume), and an off-record privacy gate. Sibling to the Claude Code and Hermes plugins; sessions hand over cleanly between harnesses.
defaultPrompt: Start a Librarian session and recall what we know about the current project.
